channel.title: Resolves on Karim Pages
channel.description: Recent content in Resolves on Karim Pages

item.title: Cara Memperbaiki Possibly Missing Firmware for Module: Xhci_pci Pada Arch Linux
item.description: Buka terminal Masuk kedalam folder /tmp, dengan mengetikan perintah berikut di terminal

item.title: Memperbaiki Possibly Missing Firmware for Module: Wd719x Pada Arch Linux
item.description: Buka terminal Masuk kedalam folder /tmp, dengan mengetikan perintah berikut di terminal
